description: Phishing templates targeting manufacturing and supply chain personnel

templates.name: Supplier Portal Update Required
suggested_subject_lines: Supplier portal update required — re-registration needed
Procurement: Your vendor portal access is expiring
Action Required: Update your supplier account credentials
templates.notes: Aimed at procurement, vendor-management, and supply-chain staff. The portal re-registration pretext fits routine B2B workflows and slips past casual skepticism. Most effective when the portal name mirrors a real procurement system.

templates.name: SAP Ariba – Purchase Order Review
suggested_subject_lines: New purchase order awaiting your review
A purchase order has been routed to you in SAP Ariba
templates.notes: Procurement workflow lure for manufacturing/supply-chain roles. Routine PO routing lowers suspicion.

templates.name: Coupa – Supplier Banking Verification
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: verify your supplier banking details
Coupa: remittance information must be re-verified
Your supplier payment details are pending verification
templates.notes: Banking-verification (BEC-adjacent) lure for vendor/AP-facing staff. Advanced; train on out-of-band verification.
